query: Can you help devise a 7-day travel itinerary for 2 people, beginning in Salt Lake City and includes visiting 3 unique cities in Montana from March 16th to 22nd, 2022? We have a planned budget of $7,200. In terms of accommodations, we would like places where parties are permitted. Throughout our stay, we'd wish to enjoy various cuisines, including American, Mediterranean, Indian, and Chinese. Lastly, we prefer not to drive ourselves throughout this journey.

plan.transportation: F3829434, from Salt Lake City to Billings

plan.attraction: Western Heritage Center;Pictograph Cave State Park;Moss Mansion Museum;Yellowstone Art Museum;Yellowstone County Museum;ZooMontana;Riverfront Park;Lake Elmo State Park;Two Moon Park;Wise Wonders Science and Discovery Museum;Pioneer Park;Castle Rock Park;Coulson Park;Four Dances Recreation Area;Zimmerman Park;Swords Park;Phipps Park;Oasis;Shiloh Conservation Area;Rimrock View Pullout

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Billings to Great Falls

plan.attraction: C. M. Russell Museum;The Lewis and Clark Interpretive Center;Children's Museum of Montana;Electric City Water Park;Paris Gibson Square Museum of Art;The History Museum;Giant Springs State Park;West Bank Park;Gibson Park;Malmstrom Museum and Air Park;Lewis & Clark Trail Heritage Foundation;Great Falls Dam View;Wooden Turtle Carving;Statue of Liberty Replica;Wadsworth Park;Tool Tree;Rainbow Dam;St. Ann's Cathedral;Black Eagle Memorial Island;Great Falls Parks Recreation

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Great Falls to Bozeman

plan.attraction: Museum of the Rockies;Gallatin History Museum;American Computer & Robotics Museum;Bozeman Sculpture Park;The Story Mansion and Story Park;Montana Science Center;Peets Hill/Burke Park;Glen Lake Rotary Park;Dinosaur Park;College 'M';Lindley Park Center;Bozeman Pond;Gallatin County Regional Park;Montana Grizzly Encounter;Yellowstone Glacier Adventures;Bozeman Welcome Sign;Bogert Park;Cooper Park;Snowfill Recreation Area;The Extreme History Project

plan.current_city: from Bozeman to Salt Lake City
plan.transportation: F3500804, from Bozeman to Salt Lake City
